scripts.validate:realworld: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium npx playwright test tests/realworld-validation
scripts.benchmark:baseline:app: cross-env BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:baseline:all: cross-env APP_ID=angular-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env APP_ID=realworld BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env APP_ID=vue3-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:collect:app: cross-env BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=collect npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:prepare:app: npm run benchmark:collect:app && npm run benchmark:generate:app
scripts.benchmark:mutate:app: cross-env BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:mutate:all: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=angular-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=realworld BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=vue3-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:mutate:sample:all: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=angular-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate MUTATION_LIMIT=1 npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=realworld BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate MUTATION_LIMIT=1 npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=vue3-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate MUTATION_LIMIT=1 npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
scripts.benchmark:aggregate:all: npx ts-node --transpile-only src/murun/runner/aggregate.ts test-results/angular-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/benchmark-runs test-results/angular-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/aggregate && npx ts-node --transpile-only src/murun/runner/aggregate.ts test-results/realworld/realworld-active/benchmark-runs test-results/realworld/realworld-active/aggregate && npx ts-node --transpile-only src/murun/runner/aggregate.ts test-results/vue3-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/benchmark-runs test-results/vue3-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/aggregate
scripts.reports:generate: npm run benchmark:coverage:realworld && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-realworld-corpus-report.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-operator-reports.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-accessibility-summary-reports.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-pipeline-verification.ts
